build-engine.description: Build orchestrator — runs the 22-stage pipeline, quality gates, and deploy

ux-engineer.description: Frontend designer — redesigns pages, ships premium UI, applies design-taste and high-end-visual-design skills

start-engine.description: Start the build engine server on port 3001
start-engine.template: Run `npm run server` from the project root and confirm it starts on port 3001

start-web.description: Start the Next.js web UI dev server
start-web.template: Run `cd web && npm run dev` and open the URL

verify.description: Run quality gates — lint, typecheck, build
verify.template: Run `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build` in the web directory and report any failures
